PART I

Item 1. Business
We develop and market cloud services, productivity software, and gaming
platforms. Our flagship product is the Azure cloud platform.

Item 1A. Risk Factors
Cybersecurity attacks could materially affect our business. We rely on
third-party suppliers for silicon and server hardware.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis
Revenue grew 15% year over year, driven by Azure consumption.

Item 8. Financial Statements and Supplementary Data
Total revenue: 245 billion USD.
